Name: UPhysicsConstraintComponent
Description: This is effectively a joint that allows you to connect 2 rigid bodies together. You can create different types of joints using the various parameters of this component.

Variables.Name: ConstraintActor1
Variables.Description: Pointer to first Actor to constrain.

Variables.Name: ComponentName1
Variables.Description:
Name of first component property to constrain. If Actor1 is NULL, will look within Owner.
	 	If this is NULL, will use RootComponent of Actor1

Variables.Name: ConstraintActor2
Variables.Description: Pointer to second Actor to constrain.

Variables.Name: ComponentName2
Variables.Description:
Name of second component property to constrain. If Actor2 is NULL, will look within Owner. 
	 	If this is NULL, will use RootComponent of Actor2

Functions.Name: SetConstrainedComponents
Functions.Description: Directly specify component to connect. Will update frames based on current position.

Functions.Name: BreakConstraint
Functions.Description: Break this constraint

Functions.Name: SetLinearPositionDrive
Functions.Description: EnablesDisables linear position drive

Params.Name: bEnableDriveX
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the X-Axis should be enabled

Params.Name: bEnableDriveY
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the Y-Axis should be enabled

Params.Name: bEnableDriveZ
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the Z-Axis should be enabled

Functions.Name: SetLinearVelocityDrive
Functions.Description: EnablesDisables linear position drive

Params.Name: bEnableDriveX
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the X-Axis should be enabled

Params.Name: bEnableDriveY
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the Y-Axis should be enabled

Params.Name: bEnableDriveZ
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the Z-Axis should be enabled

Functions.Name: SetAngularOrientationDrive
Functions.Description: EnablesDisables angular orientation drive. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Params.Name: bEnableSwingDrive
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the swing axis should be enabled. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Params.Name: bEnableTwistDrive
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the twist axis should be enabled. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Functions.Name: SetOrientationDriveTwistAndSwing
Functions.Description: EnablesDisables angular orientation drive. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Params.Name: bEnableTwistDrive
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the twist axis should be enabled. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Params.Name: bEnableSwingDrive
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the swing axis should be enabled. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Functions.Name: SetOrientationDriveSLERP
Functions.Description: EnablesDisables the angular orientation slerp drive. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to SLERP

Params.Name: bEnableSLERP
Params.Description: Indicates whether the SLERP drive should be enabled. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to SLERP

Functions.Name: SetAngularVelocityDriveTwistAndSwing
Functions.Description: EnablesDisables angular velocity twist and swing drive. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Params.Name: bEnableTwistDrive
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the twist axis should be enabled. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Params.Name: bEnableSwingDrive
Params.Description: Indicates whether the drive for the swing axis should be enabled. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to Twist and Swing

Functions.Name: SetAngularVelocityDriveSLERP
Functions.Description: EnablesDisables the angular velocity slerp drive. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to SLERP

Params.Name: bEnableSLERP
Params.Description: Indicates whether the SLERP drive should be enabled. Only relevant if the AngularDriveMode is set to SLERP

Functions.Name: SetAngularDriveMode
Functions.Description: Switches the angular drive mode between SLERP and Twist And Swing

Params.Name: DriveMode
Params.Description: The angular drive mode to use. SLERP uses shortest spherical path, but will not work if any angular constraints are locked. Twist and Swing decomposes the path into the different angular degrees of freedom but may experience gimbal lock

Functions.Name: SetLinearPositionTarget
Functions.Description: Sets the target position for the linear drive.

Params.Name: InPosTarget
Params.Description: Target position

Functions.Name: SetLinearVelocityTarget
Functions.Description: Sets the target velocity for the linear drive.

Params.Name: InVelTarget
Params.Description: Target velocity

Functions.Name: SetLinearDriveParams
Functions.Description: Sets the drive params for the linear drive.

Params.Name: PositionStrength
Params.Description: Positional strength for the drive (stiffness)

Params.Name: VelocityStrength
Params.Description: Velocity strength of the drive (damping)

Params.Name: InForceLimit
Params.Description: Max force applied by the drive

Functions.Name: SetAngularOrientationTarget
Functions.Description: Sets the target orientation for the angular drive.

Params.Name: InPosTarget
Params.Description: Target orientation

Functions.Name: SetAngularVelocityTarget
Functions.Description: Sets the target velocity for the angular drive.

Params.Name: InVelTarget
Params.Description: Target velocity

Functions.Name: SetAngularDriveParams
Functions.Description: Sets the drive params for the angular drive.

Params.Name: PositionStrength
Params.Description: Positional strength for the drive (stiffness)

Params.Name: VelocityStrength
Params.Description: Velocity strength of the drive (damping)

Params.Name: InForceLimit
Params.Description: Max force applied by the drive

Functions.Name: SetLinearXLimit
Functions.Description: Sets the LinearX Motion Type

Params.Name: ConstraintType
Params.Description: New Constraint Type

Params.Name: LimitSize
Params.Description: Size of limit

Functions.Name: SetLinearYLimit
Functions.Description: Sets the LinearY Motion Type

Params.Name: ConstraintType
Params.Description: New Constraint Type

Params.Name: LimitSize
Params.Description: Size of limit

Functions.Name: SetLinearZLimit
Functions.Description: Sets the LinearZ Motion Type

Params.Name: ConstraintType
Params.Description: New Constraint Type

Params.Name: LimitSize
Params.Description: Size of limit

Functions.Name: SetAngularSwing1Limit
Functions.Description: Sets the Angular Swing1 Motion Type

Params.Name: Swing1LimitAngle
Params.Description: Size of limit in degrees

Functions.Name: SetAngularSwing2Limit
Functions.Description: Sets the Angular Swing2 Motion Type

Params.Name: Swing2LimitAngle
Params.Description: Size of limit in degrees

Functions.Name: SetAngularTwistLimit
Functions.Description: Sets the Angular Twist Motion Type

Params.Name: ConstraintType
Params.Description: New Constraint Type

Params.Name: TwistLimitAngle
Params.Description: Size of limit in degrees

Functions.Name: SetLinearBreakable
Functions.Description: Sets the Linear Breakable properties

Params.Name: bLinearBreakable
Params.Description: Whether it is possible to break the joint with linear force

Params.Name: LinearBreakThreshold
Params.Description: Force needed to break the joint

Functions.Name: SetAngularBreakable
Functions.Description: Sets the Angular Breakable properties

Params.Name: bAngularBreakable
Params.Description: Whether it is possible to break the joint with angular force

Params.Name: AngularBreakThreshold
Params.Description: Torque needed to break the joint

Functions.Name: GetCurrentTwist
Functions.Description: Gets the current Angular Twist of the constraint

Functions.Name: GetCurrentSwing1
Functions.Description: Gets the current Swing1 of the constraint

Functions.Name: GetCurrentSwing2
Functions.Description: Gets the current Swing2 of the constraint
